svg.title: Hack 60 project file structure with ownership boundaries
svg.desc: Complete folder tree showing which files Claude builds (backend) vs Antigravity builds (frontend), plus shared contract files
svg.text: contracts/ws_schema.py — WebSocket message types (shared source of truth)
app.py — FastAPI server, WebSocket endpoint, CORS config
constraint_extractor.py — regex/JSON parsers, updates constraint dict
tfidf_pruner.py — TF-IDF scoring, entity whitelist, token pruning logic
kv_cache_sinks.py — Attention Sink KV-Cache slicing (PyTorch tensors)
validator.py — post-compression entity check, fallback trigger
pipeline.py — orchestrates Tier 1 → Tier 2 → Validate → Fallback
graph.py — LangGraph StateGraph: nodes, edges, conditional routing
state.py — TypedDict state schema, constraint dict type definitions
tools.py — mock travel APIs (flights, hotels, restaurants) returning JSON
inference.py — Qwen2.5 loading (INT4), generate loop, Attention Sink hook
benchmark.py — 30-turn scripted simulation, needle injection at Turn 2
metrics.py — compression ratio, goal accuracy, coherence scoring
useWebSocket.js — connect, reconnect, parse message types from ws_schema
